import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_knapsack_exact_fill_bug():
    """Test that knapsack correctly includes items that exactly fill capacity.
    Bug: weight < j should be weight <= j, excluding items that exactly match."""
    from source import knapsack
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    # Optimal: take the (3,10) item exactly filling capacity → value 10
    # Buggy code (weight < j) excludes weight==j, so it would return 5
    assert knapsack(capacity, items) == 10
